regular.name: Regular Ball
regular.description: A standard Poke Ball that has a 1x catch rate multiplier.

great.name: Great Ball
great.description: A high-performance Poke Ball that has a 1.5x catch rate multiplier.

ultra.name: Ultra Ball
ultra.description: An ultra-high-performance Poke Ball that has a 2x catch rate multiplier.

master.name: Master Ball
master.description: The ultimate Poke Ball. It catches any wild Pokemon without fail.

safari.name: Safari Ball
safari.description: A special Poke Ball used only in the Safari Zone. It has a 3x catch rate multiplier.

premier.name: Premier Ball
premier.description: A Poke Ball given as a bonus for buying 10 or more Poke Balls. It has a 1x catch rate multiplier.

net.name: Net Ball
net.description: A Poke Ball that works especially well on Bug- and Water-type Pokemon. It has a 3x catch rate multiplier. Otherwise it has a 1x catch rate multipler.

nest.name: Nest Ball
nest.description: A Poke Ball that works well on Pokemon of level less then 30. It has a variable catch rate multiplier.

repeat.name: Repeat Ball
repeat.description: A Poke Ball that works well on Pokemon of the same species that have been caught before. It has a 3x catch rate multiplier. Otherwise it has a 1x catch rate multipler.

luxury.name: Luxury Ball
luxury.description: A comfortable Poke Ball that makes a caught Pokemon more friendly toward its Trainer. It has a 1x catch rate multiplier.

quick.name: Quick Ball
quick.description: A Poke Ball that catches wild Pokemon easily if thrown at the beginning of a battle. It has a variable catch rate multiplier.

park.name: Park Ball
park.description: A special Poke Ball mostly used in Pal Park. It has a 1x catch rate multiplier.

beast.name: Beast Ball
beast.description: A unique Poke Ball used for capturing Mythical. It has a 5x catch rate multiplier. Otherwise it has a 1x catch rate multipler.

level.name: Level Ball
level.description: A Poke Ball that works better if the player's Pokemon is a higher level than the wild Pokemon. It has a variable catch rate multiplier.

moon.name: Moon Ball
moon.description: A Poke Ball that works well on Pokemon that evolve with a Moon Stone. It has a variable catch rate multiplier.

sport.name: Sport Ball
sport.description: A special Poke Ball used for contests. It has a 1x catch rate multiplier.

origin.name: Origin Ball
origin.description: A special Poke Ball used on origin pokemons. It catches any origin pokemon without failing
